name: Electrical
title: AI Tools for Electrical Contractors | Turnkey AI
meta_description: Custom AI tools for electricians — capture service calls, draft estimates, and follow up on bids. Unlimited AI agents for one flat $3,500/month. No contracts.
hero_lede: Service calls, panel upgrades, and bid requests all land on the same overloaded inbox. We build the tools that sort it, answer it, and keep the work moving.
drains: Service-call requests buried under bid emails
Panel and rewire estimates written from scratch every time
Bids that go quiet with no one tracking them
The owner doing dispatch, quoting, and field work all at once

tools.title: Service-call assistant
tools.body: Every call and form gets an instant reply. The assistant books service work, gathers panel and permit details, and flags safety-critical calls — a burning smell, sparking outlet — for immediate routing.

tools.title: Estimate drafter
tools.body: Describe the job and it drafts the estimate — materials, labor hours, your standard rates. Panel upgrades and rewires stop being a blank-page exercise.

tools.title: Bid follow-up assistant
tools.body: Larger bids get tracked and followed up on a schedule you set. Commercial and remodel work stops slipping away just because no one circled back.

tools.title: Morning job brief
tools.body: One text each morning: today's calls, crew routing, permits and inspections due, and yesterday's revenue.

cases.context: A residential and light-commercial electrical contractor.
cases.before: Service requests and bid emails mixed together; small jobs slipped while big bids got the attention.
cases.after: An assistant triages every inbound — service work booked instantly, bids logged and followed up.
cases.impact: Representative result: noticeably fewer dropped service calls and a fuller schedule for the field crew.

cases.context: An owner writing every panel-upgrade estimate after-hours.
cases.before: Quotes built from a blank page; turnaround often two to three days.
cases.after: Drafts ready for a quick morning review; quotes out the same day.
cases.impact: Representative result: ~5 hours a week reclaimed and faster quote turnaround.

faq.q: Can it recognize a safety-critical call?
faq.a: Yes. We train it on your safety triggers — a burning smell, sparking, a dead panel — and those calls get routed to a real person immediately instead of sitting in a queue.

faq.q: Will this work for both residential and commercial work?
faq.a: Yes. The tools handle quick residential service calls and longer commercial bids differently — service work books fast, bids get tracked and followed up over time.

faq.q: Do I need to switch software?
faq.a: No. We build on top of the scheduling, estimating, and CRM tools you already use. Your stack just gets smarter.
